heading: Findings
label: 2101 Findings
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–298, § 1102 Stat. 432Apr. 28, 1988“This Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Abandoned Shipwreck Act of 1987’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–298, § 1102 Stat. 432Apr. 28, 1988“This Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Abandoned Shipwreck Act of 1987’.”

children.label: a
children.text: States have the responsibility for management of a broad range of living and nonliving resources in State waters and submerged lands; and

children.label: b
children.text: included in the range of resources are certain abandoned shipwrecks, which have been deserted and to which the owner has relinquished ownership rights with no retention.
